shared_attributes.purpose: collision targets that trigger game over

context.role: Flying obstacle that can be avoided by ducking or passed under
context.screen_position: y=80px (ground + 80px), scrolls from right to left
context.usage_scenario: Appears after 200+ points, spawn probability 30-40%, flies above player's running hitbox (90px), can be passed without input

visual_specification.shape: Pteranodon with outstretched wings and long beak

animation.description: Wing flapping - Frame 1: wings up position, Frame 2: wings down position, seamless loop at 10 FPS

visual_specification.details: Long pointed beak, outstretched wings, flying pose, alternating wing positions for flight animation

relationships.shared_with: Identical sprite and animation to pterodactyl_low, only y-position differs
relationships.differences_from: pterodactyl_low flies at y=50px (requires duck), pterodactyl_high at y=80px (can pass under); cacti are ground obstacles

explicit_negations: No color differences from low variant
